name: Ginseng Extract
description: A revered adaptogenic root extract that energizes skin cells, boosts circulation, and reduces the appearance of fatigue.
scientificSummary: Ginsenosides (triterpenoid saponins) are the primary bioactive compounds that stimulate collagen synthesis and inhibit melanin.
mechanismOfAction: Ginsenosides activate PCNA and VEGF pathways, promoting cell proliferation and improving microcirculation in the dermis.

seo.title: Ginseng Extract - Korean Anti-Aging Botanical | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore how Ginseng Extract brightens, firms, and revitalizes skin through centuries-old wisdom.
